proof:
by
  by_contra hnz
  obtain ⟨f, -, h_onto⟩ := h
  obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hnz⟩
  exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.1 x.2
failed_attempts:
by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨f, _, fonto⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := fonto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.1 x.2

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · match h with
    | ⟨f, _, honto⟩ =>
      match honto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩ with
      | ⟨x, _⟩ => exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.val x.property

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨f, _, hf⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf ⟨0, Nat.succ_pos _⟩
    exact absurd x.property Nat.not_lt_zero

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf.right ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.property

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨f, -, h_onto⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.succ_pos _⟩
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.1 x.2

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n' =>
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf.right ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n'⟩
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.val x.property

successful_attempts:
by
  by_contra hnz
  obtain ⟨f, -, h_onto⟩ := h
  obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hnz⟩

by

  obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_nz⟩
  exact Nat.not_lt_zero x.val x.property

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨f, g, -, -⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).mp h
    cases (g ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩).property

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · obtain ⟨_, g, _, _⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).mp h
    cases (g ⟨0, Nat.succ_pos _⟩).property

by
  cases n with

  | succ k =>
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf.right ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    cases x.property

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨_, hon⟩ := hf
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hon ⟨0, Nat.succ_pos k⟩
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero x.val x.property).elim
